titleStmt.title: SII 34.224: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 224. Ambukōvil, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bhaktalalitēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Kōnērinmaikoṇḍān Vīrapāṇḍya, 14th year Mēsha, sudi 5, Monday, Tiruvōṇam = c. 13th Century.
Records that the king remitted the taxes in the village of Mañjiyūr in Puṉṟi-kūṟṟam, for offerings and repairs to Vīrājēndra-chōḻēśvaram temple at Aḻumbil in Paṉṟiyūr-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉac cakkaravatti kOṉEriṉmEl koṇṭāṉ
vīrapāṇṭiya tēvaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu mēṣa ṉāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu
pañcamiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvōṇattu nāḷ paṉṟi
yūrṉāṭṭu Aḻimpil ṉāyaṉār vīra rājēntira cōḷīśvaramuṭaiyaṉā
yaṉāṟkku puṉṟi kūṟṟattu mañciūr Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāt
tupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa ṉittanimantaṅkaḷukkum tiruppaṇikku muṭalāka
Ivūr kaṭamai kuṭimai Uḷḷiṭṭa sarva prāptikaḷum variyil kaḻittu
kkuṭuttōm cantirātittavarai cempilum kallilum veṭ
ṭṭi koḷka Ippaṭikku tiruvāy malantaruḷiṉa paṭikku Iḷāṉku
ṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu ṟu pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu varuṣam 10 4vatu §
Digital edition of SII 34.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
